rationale: Educ. Code §8.052 governs regional education service center initiatives and is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No operative conflict exists.
quote: As directed by the commissioner, each regional education service center shall, as necessary, use funds distributed under Section 8.123 to implement initiatives identified by the legislature.
_note: No conflict between proposed homestead exemption increase and this education service center provision.
